heading: Qualifications of conveyees
label: 1717 Qualifications of conveyees
text: No tract of land may be disposed of under this Act, whether by sale, exchange, or donation, to any person who is not a citizen of the United States, or in the case of a corporation, is not subject to the laws of any State or of the United States.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Federal Land Policy and Management Act of 1976. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 94–57990 Stat. 2743Oct. 21, 1976
